full_description: Move a chosen block from its mat to the center and press the button, return the same block to its mat and press again, then move the other block to the center and press once more.
seen: Move a chosen block from its mat to the center and press the button, return the same block to its mat and press again, then move the other block to the center and press once more.
unseen: Move a chosen block from its mat to the center and press the button, return the same block to its mat and press again, then move the other block to the center and press once more.
